name: fashion-mnist-mlp
short_description: MLP model trained on the Fashion MNIST dataset with PyTorch 2.8.0 + CANN 8.5.0 with the architecture below.
full_description:
MLP model trained on the Fashion MNIST dataset with PyTorch 2.8.0 + CANN 8.5.0 with the architecture below. 1. 1st hidden layer with 784 input channels, 1024 output channels, ReLU activation
1. 1st dropout layer with `p = 0.3`
1. 2nd hidden layer with 1024 input channels, 512 output channels, ReLU activation
1. 2nd dropout layer with `p = 0.2`
1. Fully connected layer with 512 input channels, 10 output channels See the included notebook for details.
author: donaldsebleung

ai_model.description: MLP model trained on the Fashion MNIST dataset with PyTorch 2.8.0 + CANN 8.5.0 with the architecture below.
ai_model.name: fashion-mnist-mlp
